action_boundary: Should the USD 1000 refund on order OR-772 be issued?
communication_boundary: Remaining refundable balance controls, not original charge alone.

documents.text: Refund request REF-OR772 asks to issue USD 1000 on order OR-772.
Original charge CHG-OR772 for order OR-772 is USD 1200.
Refund ledger LEDGER-OR772 shows no prior refund rows for order OR-772.
Customer operations approval AUTH-OR772 approves refund review for order OR-772 on 2026-07-03.
Refund release requires requested refund amount not exceed remaining refundable balance after prior refunds.
